name: Tianqi Luo
title: PhD Student
bio: I am a PhD student at HKUST(GZ), advised by Professor Yuyu Luo and Professor Nan Tang. My research focuses on Data Visualization and Natural Language Interfaces for Data Visualization (NL2VIS), building intelligent systems that bridge the gap between natural language and visual data representation.
collaboration_note: I am currently looking for collaborators on interesting projects in these areas, and I would be happy to connect if you are interested.
